choices.text: Test parameter neighborhood. Robust: length 14=1.8, 13=1.7, 15=1.7 (smooth). Overfit: length 14=1.8 but 13=-0.5, 15=0.2 (spiky). Pick mid-range robust values, not isolated peaks.

questions.explanation: Smooth parameter neighborhood = robust; spiky = curve-fit.

choices.text: IS/OOS split (optimize 2018-2022, test 2023-2024 untouched) + walk-forward (rolling re-train) + multi-symbol + multi-regime test. Lock parameters; paper-trade 3 months. Then live.
